message:
feat(benchmark): complete metrics framework with MAP, CV, and bootstrap CI

Implements bd-164: Define benchmark metric structs and collection framework.

Changes to SpeedMetrics:
- Add warm_latency_max_ms field for max observed latency
- Add jitter_cv field for coefficient of variation (latency stability)

Changes to QualityMetrics:
- Add map_at_10 field for Mean Average Precision

New metric computation functions:
- map_at_k(): Mean Average Precision calculation
- coefficient_of_variation(): Jitter/stability measurement
- cv_from_durations(), percentile_from_durations(), max_latency_ms(): Duration helpers
- bootstrap_ci(): Confidence interval for single sample mean

Infrastructure:
- Add Deserialize and Default derives to all metric structs
- Update runner.rs to populate new SpeedMetrics fields
- Add 28 comprehensive tests including edge cases and property-based tests

This unblocks bd-120 (benchmark runner), bd-cy0 (test corpus), and bd-2ep (reranker lift).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
